title: Monthly predictions tournament!
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Hey folks! 

We are glad to announce that we launched weekly and monthly predictions tournament. You can now bet on your favorite stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets to win big rewards. At Tickeron you can bet on securities moving sideways, downwards, or upwards. Imagine you anticipate the Apple stock to fall by the end of next month? - You can click on “bearish within next month” and wait for the price to depreciate. If you are right and Apple trades lower next month, then you will be credited with the reward points. Make as many predictions as you can to gain points and win big prizes. 

https://preview.redd.it/qa5mxgzm88n61.png?width=1248&format=png&auto=webp&s=d734d82dd2c023a18067427a9ff5f009ee08903e
